headline: 3 Reasons to Avoid CNC and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Centene has been on fire lately. In the past six months alone, the company’s stock price has rocketed 60.4%, reaching $64.89 per share. This was partly due to its solid quarterly results, and the performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

raw.headline: 3 Reasons to Avoid CNC and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
raw.summary: Centene has been on fire lately. In the past six months alone, the company’s stock price has rocketed 60.4%, reaching $64.89 per share. This was partly due to its solid quarterly results, and the performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: CNC Stock Falls 4% As Centene Reportedly Eyes Employee Buyouts Amid Membership Decline
summary: According to a Bloomberg report, a Centene spokesperson confirmed the company is offering voluntary buyouts to most staff as part of a cost-cutting effort.

raw.summary: According to a Bloomberg report, a Centene spokesperson confirmed the company is offering voluntary buyouts to most staff as part of a cost-cutting effort.

headline: 3 Unprofitable Stocks That Concern Us
summary: Running at a loss can be a red flag. Many of these businesses face mounting challenges as competition increases and funding becomes harder to secure.
